case_title: CONARD HOUSE INCORPORATED VS. PAMELA DAY et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONARD HOUSE INCORPORATED AS TO DEFENDANT DAY, PAMELA DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT DAY, PAMELA HEARING SET FOR FEB-01-2012 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY DEFENDANT DAY, PAMELA HEARING SET FOR JAN-27-2012 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 501
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: DROHAN, THOMAS E SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR DAY, PAMELA
UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION, 501, DEFENDANT PAMELA DAY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, OFF CALENDAR PER THOMAS E. DROHAN, DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL. (501/REQ)
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONARD HOUSE INCORPORATED ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT DAY, PAMELA

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON FEB-01-2012 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT PAMELA DAY'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO DEFENDANT DAY, PAMELA
FEES NOT PAID. THE STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PAMELA DAY ON 1/24/12 IS STRIKEN. THE STRIKING OF THE FILING IS STAYED FOR 10 DAYS. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES. (206)
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR TRACKING OF PAYMENT OF PAMELA DAY'S FIRST APPEARANCE FEES HEARING SET FOR APR-09-2012 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 206
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
